'''gadhugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebrass|zebrass]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebrass|zebrass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gadhugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædhigith|gædhigith]] || [[word:gædhigij|gædhigij]] || [[word:gædhigish|gædhigish]] || [[word:gædhigi|gædhigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadhudhuguth|gadhudhuguth]] || [[word:gadhudhuguj|gadhudhuguj]] || [[word:gadhudhugush|gadhudhugush]] || [[word:gadhudhugu|gadhudhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadhuguth|gadhuguth]] || [[word:gadhuguj|gadhuguj]] || [[word:gadhugush|gadhugush]] || [[word:gadhugu|gadhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadhufguth|gadhufguth]] || [[word:gadhufguj|gadhufguj]] || [[word:gadhufgush|gadhufgush]] || [[word:gadhufguf|gadhufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gadhuguthu|gadhuguthu]] || [[word:gadhuguju|gadhuguju]] || [[word:gadhugushu|gadhugushu]] || [[word:gadhuguku|gadhuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gadhuguth|gadhuguth]] || [[word:gadhuguj|gadhuguj]] || [[word:gadhugush|gadhugush]] || [[word:gadhugu|gadhugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gadhuguthul|gadhuguthul]] || [[word:gadhugujul|gadhugujul]] || [[word:gadhugushul|gadhugushul]] || [[word:gadhugukul|gadhugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gadhuguthuthu|gadhuguthuthu]] || [[word:gadhugujuju|gadhugujuju]] || [[word:gadhugushushu|gadhugushushu]] || [[word:gadhuguku|gadhuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gadhuguthun|gadhuguthun]] || [[word:gadhugujun|gadhugujun]] || [[word:gadhugushun|gadhugushun]] || [[word:gadhugukun|gadhugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gadhuguthuoro|gadhuguthuoro]] || [[word:gadhugujuoro|gadhugujuoro]] || [[word:gadhugushuoro|gadhugushuoro]] || [[word:gadhugukuoro|gadhugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
